rationale: The only direct linkage provided is a single DOI-matched reference entry, with no in-text citation context or quoted surrounding text from the citing paper. The cited paper’s setting (Wal-Mart entry and incumbent reactions in CPG retail) is different from the citing paper’s focal problem (hotel rebranding effects), so substantive reliance is not clearly demonstrated from current evidence. Because both are empirical marketing studies using quasi-experimental/causal designs, it cannot be safely dropped as an obvious mention-only citation.
